description: Data loaded from CSV file: 63.csv (Dataset: 🛍️ Predict Customer Purchase Behavior Dataset)

fields.name: Age
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the age in years of individual customers, indicating their demographic segment for analyzing purchase behavior in retail or e-commerce settings.

fields.name: Gender
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field encodes a customer's gender as a binary value (0 and 1), likely distinguishing between male and female for analyzing purchase behavior in retail or e-commerce contexts.

fields.name: AnnualIncome
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: AnnualIncome represents each customer's yearly earned income in currency units, providing a numeric measure of their financial status for use in predicting purchasing behavior.

fields.name: NumberOfPurchases
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: NumberOfPurchases represents the total count of purchases a customer has made, indicating their buying activity within a specific period or across their relationship with the business.

fields.name: ProductCategory
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: ProductCategory numerically encodes the type of product a customer interacts with, categorizing purchases into five distinct groups within a retail context.

fields.name: TimeSpentOnWebsite
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: TimeSpentOnWebsite represents the amount of time, in minutes, that a customer spends browsing the online store during a single visit, indicating their level of engagement prior to making a purchase decision.

fields.name: LoyaltyProgram
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: Indicates whether a customer is enrolled in the store's loyalty program (1 for enrolled, 0 for not enrolled).

fields.name: DiscountsAvailed
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: Number of distinct discounts a customer used or applied during a single purchase transaction in a retail shopping context.

fields.name: PurchaseStatus
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: PurchaseStatus indicates whether a customer completed a purchase (1) or not (0) in a shopping transaction within the retail domain.

formatted_summary:

  - LoyaltyProgram -- type: int64, values: 0, 1
